rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing arguments to function calls
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Function calls must provide the correct number of arguments
Use valid AADL feature names in contracts
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; remove invalid clauses instead
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
